(416) MTHR PRESENT W/ATTY=J. JACKSON; FTHR PRESENT PRO PER; ADA=COTE; MTHR STIPULATES TO AGREEMENT W/FTHR FOR $200.00/MN AS SUPPORT AMOUNT FOR TIME PERIOD FROM 3/1/95 T
HROUGH 10/31/96; DA TO FIGURE OUT AND PROVIDE ACCOUNTING TO COURT AND TO FTHR FOR ARRS BASED ON $200.00/MN SUPPORT AMOUNT FOR THAT TIME PERIOD;
HERAPY COSTS, COURT FINDS $100.00/MN IS REASONABLE AMOUNT FOR THIS AND ORDERS FTHR TO PAY ONE-HALF AS HIS SHARE=$50.00/MN COMM 8/15/98; IF MTHR WISHES
ADDED TO FTHR'S ARRS AMOUNT W/DA'S OFFICE; RE: DAYCARE/CHILD CARE COSTS, COURT FINDS $125/MN FOR CHILD CARE+ $300.00/MN YEAR ROUND FOR SUMMER CAMP
AUGUST 1998 AND TO PAY $450.00/MN ($300.00 CHILD SUPPORT + $50.00 MEDICAL + $100.00 CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTIONS) COMM 9/1/98; RE: ATTY'S FEE, MTHR'S
ECEIPT OF FTHR'S REQUEST, COURT TO MAKE DETERMINATION; RE: CUSTODY, COURT WILL NOT CHANGE TO PHYSICAL AND LEGAL CUSTODY ORDER BUT INSTEAD WILL ORDER
TRAVEL W/CHILD OUTSIDE OF SAN FRANCISCO INCLUDING ABROAD SO LONG AS TRAVEL DOES NOT EXCEED THREE WEEKS; IF MORE THAN THREE WEEKS, MTHR TO BRING
HEARING. (SLABACH) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ADRIENNE PERETTI #11029
